g.text: Match Monitor Saba Group Betting - Main Business Flow (Updated 2025-11-19)
- Map Saba CustID to CTS internal CTSCustID
Group by: MatchID, ScoreDiff, BettypeID, BetID, Betteam
This is KEY difference from standard:
- Update SystemParameter (162 for Live, 163 for NonLive)
- Maps Saba CustID to CTS CTSCustID
